title: Piquant Charred Tunisian Lamb Tagine
description: A weeknight Tunisian dish featuring charred lamb, apricot jam, and ayurvedic rajasic friendly ingredients, cooked to perfection in a ttukbaegi earthenware pot.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
Heat the olive oil in the ttukbaegi earthenware pot over medium high heat.
Add the lamb pieces and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it starts to caramelize, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for 1 minute.
Stir in the cumin, coriander, cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper.
Add the apricot jam and stir to combine.
Cover the pot and transfer it to the preheated oven.
Cook for 2 1/2 hours, or until the lamb is tender and the sauce is thickened.
Remove the pot from the oven and let it cool for 10 minutes.
Serve the lamb and sauce over couscous or rice.
